headline: Walmart makes major move to lure customers from Amazon Prime Day
summary: Walmart is ramping up its efforts to prevent customers from flocking to Amazon’s upcoming Prime Day event, which offers steep discounts across multiple product categories. Last year, Amazon Prime Day drove $24.1 billion in online spend across U.S. retailers, representing 30.3% year-over-year ...

headline: Why Wells Fargo Is Warning That Surging AI Token Costs Is a Death Knell for Hyperscaler Stocks Like Meta and Microsoft

headline: Hershey Adds Tech Veteran Joe Park To Guide Digital And Margin Choices
summary: Hershey (NYSE:HSY) has appointed Joe Park to its Board of Directors. Park brings digital transformation and technology strategy experience from State Farm, Yum! Brands, and Walmart. Hershey, known for its confectionery and snacks portfolio, is operating in a consumer sector where brands are putting more focus on digital engagement, data, and automation. Adding a director with a technology background is consistent with broader moves across consumer companies to refine supply chains,...

headline: Jeff Bezos Came Out Of Retirement For This $41 Billion AI Bet— He Explains Why He Couldn't 'Sit On The Sidelines'
summary: Jeff Bezos returns to CEO role at AI startup Prometheus, calling AI work a demanding but rewarding "Type 2 fun."
